hypothesis: If breadth thrust family probe is valid, the bounded tests should improve the motivating diagnostic without weakening Gold Status economics. Rationale: Family confidence diagnostics need an independent breadth-thrust style family instead of another EMA or VJATR sibling.
stop_conditions: no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
candidate family remains crowded or redundant
quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
candidate does not improve independence from Gold anchors
candidate misses rebound participation after breadth thrusts
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion
